title: The Lady Wants Mink
writer: Dane Lussier, Richard Alan Simmons, Leonard Neubauer
actors: Dennis O'Keefe, Ruth Hussey, Eve Arden
plot: For her birthday, Ritchie Connors gives his wife Nora a coat from the store where he works. His workday gloom is made even worse when their friend from next-door shows up that evening in a mink. To try and make things right, Nora ...
